name: Vegetable Stew with Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion, bell peppers, and cabbage into 1-inch squares.
2. Cut carrots on diagonal into thin slices.
3. Chop 3 cloves of garlic and crush the remaining clove through a press. Cut green beans into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
4. Combine soy sauce and brown sugar in a small bowl.
5. Heat oil in a large deep skillet over high heat. Stir-fry onion until browned around the edges, about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Add carrots, bell peppers, chopped garlic, ginger, and crushed red pepper flakes; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Add cabbage and stir-fry until slightly wilted, about 3-5 minutes.
8. Add broccoli, cauliflower, and 1 3/4 cups of the broth to the skillet. Bring to a boil, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 to 7 minutes.
9. In a small bowl, combine peanut butter, remaining broth, soy sauce mixture, lemon juice, sugar, and crushed garlic.
10. Stir the peanut sauce into the stew and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
11. Serve in bowls with chopped peanuts and scallions sprinkled on top.
